textByHash.0f74978d3a24b00bfb655c294db4cfd0722eeedf: If you t'ink you're tough, find Gorad, my enemy to the south-east, and knock one of his teeth out! Heheheheh!
textByHash.32fd72497642b5c12da8e12c2222eee4205d13d5: Morsel, you dare to return without the tooth! Either you are stoopid, or wants to be eaten!
textByHash.43fc766310e2536df474022f50ca710cde1ffebc: What are you doing here, morsel?
textByHash.6ee6ffbb6a5318f1b882ac2474fc62af96ef23e1: You probably got it stored somewhere, morsel! Humans do that a lot.
textByHash.921652bcce29de7bbd04f599ae502c8fb339a785: That'll annoy Gorad lots! Heheheheh! Here's a token of my gratitude: some old gem I stole from Gorad, and an old part of a statue.
textByHash.987106f0906e395348ecad0cd076483efb0b3c6f: What can a morsel like you do for me?
textByHash.9d36c4a83a2df83374fb0633b5145cff7a11af62: I have nothing left for you but the cooking pot!
textByHash.a56f05fa8005b7a728828585b330a866734ccf07: How dare you lie to me morsel! I will grind you up for my bread!
textByHash.ab286b7f16a230c94f8b246e2b07d9994804acdd: I suppose you want another? I suppose just this once I could give you my copy...
textByHash.b442a6391d41871245b00a310f9dd2ad048799e0: The morsel is back. Does it have our tooth for us?
textByHash.d58590be1aed8b4cc13386bf266ca1e51a49eb93: Well, well, perhaps the morsel can help after all...
textByHash.db3d09c14589d4284acc7bf9e0287e1878e4fa73: What do you want, little morsel? You would look good on my plate!
textByHash.e3f6ed22e8dd2eb48f2532892d600e82eec92087: Stupid morsel, I have another. Take it and go now before I lose my temper.
textByHash.ffc1c31f77bf0af4b32f6bd940e1975756b19c8b: Hah! I should eat you instead!
